utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hi , is uh , is Carol here ?

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: No , she is at a faculty meeting .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , I uh , just came by to pick up my skull . Well , not mine , but ...

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Thanks . Yeah , Carol borrowed it for a class , and I have to get it back to the museum .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Kinda like a big face without skin .

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: Yes , I am familiar with the concept . We can just look for it .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ok . Wow , you guys sure have a lot of books about bein a lesbian .

emotion_cause.span: 9_you guys sure have a lot of books about bein a lesbian .

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: Well , you know , you have to take a course . Otherwise , they do not let you do it .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , hey , Yertle the Turtle . A classic .

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: Actually , I am reading it to the baby .

emotion_cause.span: 12_I am reading it to the baby .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: The uh , the baby that has not been born yet ? Would not that mean you are ... crazy ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_the baby that has not been born yet ?

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: What , you do not think they can hear sounds in there ?

emotion_cause.span: 14_you do not think they can hear sounds in there ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You are not serious , I mean , you really ... you really talk to it ?

emotion_cause.span: 14_you do not think they can hear sounds in there ?
